facts: 1M+1M R&D events with known signal+background; 3 black-box datasets with unknown injected anomalies; simulates MC-to-data gap.
hypotheses: Black-box anomaly scores correlate with R&D training.
Anomaly detection generalizes across the 3 black boxes (BB1→BB2, BB3).
intuitions: An LHC Olympics retrospective spanning 2020-2024 and ATLAS/CMS anomaly detection in actual Run 2/3 data likely exist.
unknowns: MC-to-data shift is compound (showers + hadronization + detector + pileup), and there is no established primitive for a 'compound shift mechanism'.
